summary: Round 18 preview is live with five tips: Rabbitohs, Dragons, Sharks, Sea Eagles and Knights. No Round 18 charity bet is locked, so the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger remains 3-2 and +$0.53.

sources.label: 2026 NRL season results: Round 18 fixture table
NRL Late Mail Round 18: Oryn Keeley set to start as Ativalu Lisati ruled out

scoreboard.note: Upset lean only. Penrith are without Nathan Cleary, Isaah Yeo, Liam Martin and Isaiah Papali'i, while Souths regain Jack Wighton but lose Cameron Murray and Alex Johnston.
Low-confidence home lean. Tigers regain Alex Twal but lose Jarome Luai to delayed concussion symptoms and Taylan May to a shoulder injury.
Top confidence tip. Brisbane are missing Reece Walsh, Payne Haas, Pat Carrigan and multiple depth pieces; Cronulla lose key forwards but retain Hynes and Trindall.
Manly lose Luke Brooks and Haumole Olakau'atu, but still carry Tom Trbojevic and Jamal Fogarty. Parramatta lose Mitchell Moses, with Jonah Pezet coming in.
Home lean. Newcastle miss Kalyn Ponga and Bradman Best, but Dolphins are without Isaiya Katoa, Hamiso Tabuai-Fidow, Jack Bostock, Selwyn Cobbo, Max Plath and Thomas Flegler.

liveAlerts.text: Round 18 preview is live: tips are Rabbitohs, Dragons, Sharks, Sea Eagles and Knights.
Charity ledger remains 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
No Round 18 charity bet is locked; Sharks are a price-watch candidate only.
Origin-week volatility is high: do not chase last week's Panthers and Storm losses.
Byes: Raiders, Bulldogs, Titans, Storm, Warriors, Cowboys and Roosters.
